trans-unit.source: WebShop orders not fully released (%1 open)
trans-unit.note: Codeunit WebShop Order Monitor JQ - NamedType WebShopOrdersNotReleasedLbl

trans-unit.source: The WebShop monitor detected open sales orders that were not released.
trans-unit.target: Der WebShop-Monitor hat offene Verkaufsaufträge erkannt, die nicht freigegeben wurden.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit WebShop Order Monitor JQ - Method BuildMailBody - NamedType WebShopMonitorDetectedLbl
Codeunit WebShop Order Monitor JQ - Method BuildMailBody - NamedType OpenWebShopOrdersLbl
Codeunit WebShop Order Monitor JQ - Method BuildMailBody - NamedType OldestOrderNoLbl
Codeunit WebShop Order Monitor JQ - Method BuildMailBody - NamedType OldestPostingDateLbl
Codeunit WebShop Order Monitor JQ - Method BuildMailBody - NamedType LastOpenOrderNoLbl
Codeunit WebShop Order Monitor JQ - Method BuildMailBody - NamedType AlertThresholdLbl
Codeunit WebShop Order Monitor JQ - Method BuildMailBody - NamedType AlertDelayLbl
Codeunit WebShop Order Monitor JQ - Method BuildMailBody - NamedType CurrentBlockingOrderLbl
Codeunit WebShop Order Monitor JQ - Method BuildMailBody - NamedType OpenOrdersLbl
Codeunit WebShop Order Monitor JQ - Method BuildMailBody - NamedType OpenOrderEntryLbl
Codeunit WebShop Order Monitor JQ - Method BuildMailBody - NamedType MoreOrdersLbl

trans-unit.source: Archiviert erfolgreich eingelesene Daten mit Status 1
trans-unit.target: Archiviert erfolgreich eingelesene Daten mit Status 1
trans-unit.note: Page NAV To BC Import List - Action Archive Data - Property ToolTip
Page NAV To BC Import List - Action Archive Data - Property Caption
Page NAV To BC Import List - Action Change Payment &Tolerance - Property ToolTip
Page NAV To BC Import List - Action Change Payment &Tolerance - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: NAV To BC Import List Archive
trans-unit.note: Page NAV To BC Import List Archive - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Restores archived item import entries from the selected period back to the import list.
trans-unit.target: Stellt archivierte Artikelimport-Einträge aus dem ausgewählten Zeitraum in der Importliste wieder her.
trans-unit.note: Page NAV To BC Import List Archive - Action Restore Archived Item Entries - Property ToolTip
Page NAV To BC Import List Archive - Action Restore Archived Item Entries - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Updates all customers with a non-empty location code other than 1 to location code 1.
trans-unit.target: Aktualisiert alle Debitoren mit einem nicht leeren Lagerortcode ungleich 1 auf Lagerortcode 1.
trans-unit.note: Page NAV To BC Import List Archive - Action Set Customer Location Code to 1 - Property ToolTip
Page NAV To BC Import List Archive - Action Set Customer Location Code to 1 - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Shows all currently valid UVP entries from table 5276536 where more than one active entry exists per article.
trans-unit.target: Zeigt alle aktuell gültigen UVP-Einträge aus Tabelle 5276536, bei denen pro Artikel mehr als ein aktiver Eintrag vorhanden ist.
trans-unit.note: Page NAV To BC Import List Archive - Action Show Current Duplicate UVP Prices - Property ToolTip
Page NAV To BC Import List Archive - Action Show Current Duplicate UVP Prices - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Shows DCE webshop items that do not have a corresponding item in Business Central.
trans-unit.target: Zeigt DCE-Webshop-Artikel, zu denen kein entsprechender Artikel in Business Central vorhanden ist.
trans-unit.note: Page NAV To BC Import List Archive - Action Show Missing DCE Items - Property ToolTip
Page NAV To BC Import List Archive - Action Show Missing DCE Items - Property Caption
Page WebShop Monitor Setup - Property Caption
Page WebShop Monitor Setup - Control NotificationEmails - Property ToolTip
Page WebShop Restore Dialog - Property Caption
Page WebShop Restore Dialog - Control General - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Enter the last date to restore. Use the same date for a single day.
trans-unit.target: Gib das letzte Datum für die Wiederherstellung ein. Verwende für einen einzelnen Tag dasselbe Datum.
trans-unit.note: Page WebShop Restore Dialog - Control EndDateCtrl - Property ToolTip
Page WebShop Restore Dialog - Control EndDateCtrl - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Enter the first date to restore.
trans-unit.target: Gib das erste Datum für die Wiederherstellung ein.
trans-unit.note: Page WebShop Restore Dialog - Control StartDateCtrl - Property ToolTip
Page WebShop Restore Dialog - Control StartDateCtrl - Property Caption
PageExtension Item Card Ext 1 - Control NAV Bestandsdaten - Property Caption
PageExtension Item Card Ext 1 - Control NAV Inventory Location 1 - Property Caption
PageExtension Item Card Ext 1 - Control NAV Inventory Location 1 no WA - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Trägt in Artikelzeilen ohne Preis den aktuell gültigen UVP aus der UVP-Tabelle ein.
trans-unit.target: Trägt in Artikelzeilen ohne Preis den aktuell gültigen UVP aus der UVP-Tabelle ein.
